commit.message: [FLINK-25038][testutils] Refactor FlinkContainer to split JM and TMs to individual containers and supports HA

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@

+package org.apache.flink.tests.util.flink.container;
+
+/** Exception indicating errors when building Flink image. */
+public class ImageBuildException extends Exception {
+    public ImageBuildException(String imageName, Throwable cause) {
+        super(String.format("Failed to build image \"%s\"", imageName), cause);
+    }
+}
